title: [ARCHIVED] Thumbnailer
description: A Minecraft modpack made for creating clean, eye-catching thumbnails.
body:
<details>
<summary>📃 Description</summary>

**Thumbnailer** is built purely for thumbnail creation. No UI, no gameplay—just a clean environment for posing, lighting, and capturing perfect shots. Ideal for content creators who want crisp, clutter-free visuals.

</details>


<details>
<summary>📱 Features</summary>

**- Posable NPCs** – Includes a mod that lets you spawn and pose NPCs for perfect character placement in your thumbnails.

**- Replay Mod Support** – Capture cinematic angles and replays to get the best possible shots.

**- Optimization Mods Included** – Boost performance and reduce lag while setting up your scenes.

**- Freecam Mod** – Fly around freely to frame your scene from any angle without UI clutter.

**- 3D Skin** – Includes a 3D skin mod to view and pose detailed character models with full skin support.

</details>


<details>
<summary>⚠️ Disclaimer</summary>

This modpack uses third-party mods and is intended for thumbnail creation only.
It does not guarantee:
- The best visual quality on all systems
- A beginner-friendly experience
- Complete safety or stability


</details>
